## What this changes

One or two sentences. If this changes the wire format, say so explicitly.

## Wire-format impact

- [ ] No wire-format change (docs / tests / examples only)
- [ ] Additive, backwards-compatible (minor)
- [ ] Breaking (major; needs coordination)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] Examples added / updated to exercise the change
- [ ] `SPEC.md` updated (if normative)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Extension changes also update `docs/extensions/<vertical>.md`
